positive: Minimalist forest spirit glyph, stylized as a continuous line drawing on a crisp white background. The design features interwoven elements of abstract flora (fern fronds, stylized blossoms) and gentle, abstract fauna (silhouetted deer antlers, soaring moth wings). The composition must be centrally balanced, creating a strong, cohesive silhouette suitable for screen printing. Use a deep emerald green and sophisticated gold metallic ink color palette for the drawing. The style is elegant, organic geometry, evoking Japanese sumi-e woodblock printing techniques combined with modern botanical illustration. Clean lines, high contrast, isolated subject, vector-like precision. --ar 1:1 --style v5.2 --v 6.0 --stylize 100
